title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 535.050 - Process shall not issue until expiration of lease, when
text:
535.050.  Process shall not issue until expiration of lease, when. — When the property is held by a written lease containing a clause declaring the lease forfeited for the nonpayment of rent for a specified time, no process shall issue against the lessee or other person occupying the premises, until the expiration of said specified time.
(RSMo 1939 § 2997) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2610; 1919 § 6904; 1909 § 7907
